name: Beef with Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into thin slices and fry slightly in a wok.
2. Remove the beef and set aside. Using the same oil, saute onions, green onion, and garlic for a few minutes.
3. Add celery, green pepper, and carrots to the wok. Continue sauteing until the carrots are almost done.
4. If needed, add water to the wok. Stir in oyster sauce, soy sauce, mushrooms, and the previously fried beef.
5. Add ramen noodles and cover the wok with water. Cook until the noodles are done.
6. Add broccoli to the wok and continue cooking until it turns dark green.
7. Mix the broccoli with the rest of the ingredients.
8. Stir in monosodium glutamate and salt (if needed). Serve over rice.
9. Serves 6 persons.
